RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ECONOMY FOODS, INC., MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE OF TRIABLE ISSUE EXIST AS TO THE AMOUNT OWED BY SUEDE BLUE IS NOT THE SAME AMOUNT SOUGHT.
